// Perspective expression — probe for connection.send + WebSocket intercept
//
// Paste into Markdown component props.source (requires escapeHtml: false).
// Open DevTools Console with Preserve Log ON BEFORE clicking.
//
// What it does:
//   Q4: Hooks WebSocket.prototype.send so ALL outgoing frames are logged [WS-OUT].
//       Reaches connection via window.__client.connection (confirmed 8.3.6).
//       Finds connection.webSocket and adds an incoming message listener [WS-IN].
//       Dumps connection.send.toString() for wire-format hints.
//       After running: interact with Perspective (click a button, change a dropdown,
//       navigate) — each interaction produces WS frames in console.
//
// Note: This probe is CUMULATIVE — run it once per page load. If you navigate
// away and back, re-run to re-hook. The hook persists until page reload.
// window.__wsHooked guards against double-hooking.
//
// Reaches connection via window.__client (confirmed 8.3.6 by Probe 1).
// No fiber walk required.



concat(
  '<div id="recon-output" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0a0a18;color:#88ee88;padding:10px;height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;border-radius:4px">Running Probe 3...</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">')
